Summary of new rules

Battles can now have up to 4 players.

  The Goal

Tron-like game body.

  Rules

The grid is 30 by 20 cells. Output one of UP, DOWN, LEFT or RIGHT.
 
Victory Conditions
Be the last remaining player

  Game Input

Input for one game turn

Line 1: Two integers N and P.

Example
Input for turn 1
2 0	(N P)
9 5	9 5
Output for turn 1
RIGHT
Moving from (9,5) to (10,5)
